mapper.select: SELECT * FROM courts WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM courts WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE
SELECT * FROM courts WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO courts (name, status, remark, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE courts SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
